title: Principal Frontend Developer at L&T Infotech International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Principal Frontend Developer at L&T Infotech International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Frontend Developer looking for your next big career move? L&T Infotech International Enterprises in Allahabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About L&T Infotech International Enterprises:
L&T Infotech International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with L&T Infotech International Enterprises!
